steps.title: Identify what needs to happen
steps.content: The goal is explicit: “emphasize a difference between the two muslins.” The decisive clue is that any correct answer must present both Dhaka muslin and sheeting muslin side-by-side and highlight their key differences—not just mention one or assert they're different.

steps.title: Find the sentence that contrasts both types
steps.content: Choice A uses while to directly contrast the two types on their key differences—handmade with fine weave versus machine-made with coarse weave—accomplishing the goal. Choices B, C, and D fail the goal: B asserts difference without showing it, C addresses uses instead of types, and D presents only one type. That matches choice A — A is correct.
